name: 影视收藏目录编写

observable_attributes.reading_strategy: Whether agent watches (reads annotation of) each video vs. judges by filename; depth of engagement with GIFs and supplementary materials
observable_attributes.output_detail: Catalog format: brief list vs. detailed reviews with ratings; whether organized by genre/chronology/rating
observable_attributes.cross_modal_behavior: How video/GIF/presentation materials are referenced or described in the written catalog

prompt_zh: 这个文件夹包含一个人的影视收藏——有电影、动画短片、预告片、GIF动图、影评文档和相关资料。请浏览所有内容，然后编写一份影视收藏目录。目录应该包含每部作品的基本信息、个人评价或简介，以及合理的分类方式。你可以自由决定目录的格式、详细程度和组织方式。
prompt_en: This folder contains someone's film and animation collection — movies, animated shorts, trailers, GIF clips, review documents, and related materials. Browse through all the content, then write a film collection catalog. The catalog should include basic information about each work, personal reviews or summaries, and a sensible classification system. You are free to decide the catalog format, level of detail, and organization approach.
behavioral_freedom: Viewing depth: watch (read annotation of) every video vs. skim filenames and metadata only
Whether GIFs and supplementary materials (PPTX, DOCX) are reviewed or skipped
Catalog structure: by genre vs. by chronology vs. by rating vs. by format
Detail level: one-line entries vs. multi-paragraph reviews per work
Whether to include ratings, recommendations, or viewing priority
Whether to create separate files (one per genre) vs. single catalog document
How trailers and clips are cataloged relative to full films
